ques: Find the most recently updated open-source project related to natural language processing on the Huggingface platform. Provide the project's name, creator, and a brief description of its functionality.
answer: Name: "swa-latn-100mb-after-ppt-shuff-dyck-100mb-ckpt500_seed3407" — Creator: fpadovani — Functionality: A GPT-2-based open-source causal language model for Swahili (swa-latn = Swahili in Latin script), fine-tuned via supervised fine-tuning (SFT, using the TRL library) on ~100MB of Swahili text; it performs text generation, producing/continuing Swahili-language text via the Transformers `text-generation` pipeline.
